受不了了，怎么那么好看！作者猛猛更！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712652976,"group_id":"7341279079787662361","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"魔仙堡应届仙女毕业生","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Vhc+/iCj1FOjFZLFW78PBgR5uJxguhNc6n+Ar27qA9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a98b462ee3744f8b86eda743e37a6cc2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707334&x-signature=iHCYmHuMWBRc7lJ7j6HWt07noJM%3D","user_id":"4336888664298046","user_name":"圆呐圆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336888664298046","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341279079787662361","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚游戏+bg+白切黑毒舌美人X外冷内骚西装暴徒+微群像】
【你有什么迫切的愿望吗？金钱，人命，权力，健康，复仇...不管什么愿望，只要付出同等的代价，新世界都能为你实现。欢迎来到新世界。】
插画师丁壹在生日这天，因为一个完全想不起来的愿望莫名进入到新世界。
开始在一个个危机重重的死亡副本中艰难求生。
作为新人，反杀NPC，手打许愿者。
小明：“姐，你是做什么工作的。”
丁壹：“画画的。”
众人惊愕：搞艺术的什么时候变得这么猛了？
丁一狠表示，不管是NPC还是许愿者，惹到她算是踢到钢板了。
...直到她踢上了另一块随时随地发大癫的磁性钨钢。
秦愿：“发什么神经可以跟你一间房？”
丁壹：“你是不是有病。”
秦愿：“有病就能跟你聊天吗？”
丁壹：.......就他妈离谱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o307589a977a9ae12a9ce074e09f07be1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一尔","author_id":"","book_id":"7341279079787662361","book_name":"欢迎来到新世界【无限流】","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7341279236654645785","read_count":"20321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"603921"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"273","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,灵异,惊悚游戏,群像,悬疑,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o307589a977a9ae12a9ce074e09f07be1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361908&x-signature=feSRksD2YrNAjG9XLbV%2Bu8PmGvU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100446902567","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191148D397CAD9F16CBA66EC84"}"},"relate_ 2.素材玄幻但又让人觉得很真实
3.后期对人物群像的描写很吸引人，让我意识到什么叫“燃
”
4.作者文笔好，不存在看不懂的情况
5.情节环环相扣，引人入胜，伏笔埋的位置很精准
……总之，这本书的优点不仅仅我所描绘出来的，但我能保证，这是一本不容错过的好书
推荐大家翻阅！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723705121,"group_id":"7341279079787662361","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看自己想看的，写自己想写的，做自己想做的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+iYyiQShVtMHUvUIqvRrIKON7YSwr90o9QMeZMPoufu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2f713e5ffaca405d90ad62b0e6161b3b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701462&x-signature=sNqcUh7cTmaBb18evZh46zEqojg%3D","user_id":"3708023423647143","user_name":"小乖不歪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3708023423647143","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341279079787662361","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚游戏+bg+白切黑毒舌美人X外冷内骚西装暴徒+微群像】

info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":59122,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":29803},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7392160144707896088","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"希望有更多的人喜欢上这本小说[爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721124156,"group_id":"7341279079787662361","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"64593635951"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341279079787662361","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"238"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27813,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7392161462867673880","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很爱这本小说，很对我胃口。
丁小壹向来就是有气就撒，很独立，不是菟丝花。里面的一些人渣也没有拖拉，该咋办就咋办，而且小说的整体逻辑性很好，没有太绕的地方。丁小壹和秦小狗他俩之间的感情有那个过程，不会让人感到突兀和不自然。小说的内容连贯性和逻辑性很OK👌[赞][赞]
丁小壹和秦小狗两人之间的那种暧昧，琢磨不清，又撩又甜的感觉真的很戳我，两人一出现就搞得我总是姨母笑[害羞][害羞]
而且，我很喜欢这本小说的一点就是三观，作为一本类似于无限流题材的小说，其实我对三观这方面的问题要求并不高。但是这本书的三观真的[赞][赞]同时，作者大大每个世界的故事性很强，有些地方也值得引入思考，很喜欢这种感觉，让我有种精神升华的意思。爱了爱了😍[爱心][爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":34,"text":"菟丝花","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8F%9F%E4%B8%9D%E8%8A%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177908BA66EC84%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227392161462867673880%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227341279079787662361%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8F%9F%E4%B8%9D%E8%8A%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721124049,"group_id":"7341279079787662361","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"刺客与月光，一起走向他乡.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8cGc9xhml7F0YQXfekdIlk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d582fb2c8b534f8eb2fee67f3cf1dc23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707761&x-signature=Gsh0yBw2FN6gmd590PNHi0Ouv5c%3D","user_id":"64593635951","user_name":"辣笔蛋黄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"64593635951","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341279079787662361","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚游戏+bg+白切黑毒舌美人X外冷内骚西装暴徒+微群像】
